name: NovaKur Minimal Theme
shortDescription: Ultra-clean, whitespace-driven OpenCart 4 theme for premium brands. Monochromatic, typographic, distraction-free.
description: NovaKur Minimal is designed for stores that let their products speak. Inspired by Muji and Apple's design philosophy — maximum whitespace, minimal color, sharp typography. Rectangular buttons, borderless cards, generous spacing. Everything is monochromatic with a single warm accent. Install via OCMOD, configure from admin panel.
